display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul is picking up a stunning 1961 Vauxhall Cresta, inspired by American design, the car changed the face of British motoring.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave's son Jack is heading out to Cheshire to collect two cars with a 35-year age difference. And luckily for Mathewsons, Lucy knows exactly what has been brought in.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon builds an eccentric chandelier from car headlights, and Henry makes an international set of clocks out of dashboard time pieces.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programme.desc: Divers search a newly discovered wreck as they investigate the story of the SS Justicia, sunk in WW1 by U-Boats off the coast of Ireland.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programme.desc: The discovery of a 19th century schooner in Lake Erie off of Ohio's coast could shed light on not just the founding of Ohio, but the settlement of North America itself.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programme.desc: Beneath the North Sea lie relics of the Battle of Jutland. It took place at the heart of WWI and an overconfident Royal Navy expected it to be easy. It was anything but.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Two British classics head into to the Mathewsons' auction room, Dave heads to North Manchester to pick up an Austin A30 and a Morris 8 E with an alternative paint job.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: An impressive collection of five iconic cars arrives at Thornton le Dale, including a 1967 Crayford Corsair and a 1966 Ford Zodiac which emerge from a garage in Selby.

programme.title: D-Day To Berlin
programme.desc: The last few months of the war involved final battles in Germany, the assault on Berlin, Hitler's death, and the emergence of a new dictator: Soviet leader Joseph Stalin.

programme.title: Last Heroes of D-Day
programme.desc: Dan Snow examines how meticulous planning, espionage and 3D aerial photos helped the Allied forces gain a foothold in northern France in June 1944.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Stanway House in the Cotswolds, where they view a collection of love letters dating from the First World War.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents a second programme from Stanway House in the Cotswolds, where the team views a painting found dumped by a motorway.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek inspects a brace of old cop cars including a Rover P6 complete with radio, sirens and V8 engine, and a former Mod waves ciao to his collection of 1960s Italian scooters.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek swaps the chaos of the office for rain-soaked Ripon to pick up a 1965 Ford Anglia with just 33,000 miles on the clock, while Dave's loving the clean lines of a.

programme.title: D-Day To Berlin
programme.desc: The last few months of the war involved final battles in Germany, the assault on Berlin, Hitler's death, and the emergence of a new dictator: Soviet leader Joseph Stalin.

programme.title: Last Heroes of D-Day
programme.desc: Dan Snow examines how meticulous planning, espionage and 3D aerial photos helped the Allied forces gain a foothold in northern France in June 1944.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Stanway House in the Cotswolds, where they view a collection of love letters dating from the First World War.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when the Naughty Lass collides with a low bridge on the Bumble Hole Canal Branch damaging a chimney.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The guys buy a confusing 1984 French Matra Murena and send it to Citroen specialists. Next, they take on a Bond classic - no, not that one - a 1977 Arctic Wetbike! S.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek collects a Ford Thames 400E that once belonged to the pop band Edison Lighthouse. Plus, Dave heads to York to collect an Astra GTE convertible.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek inspects a brace of old cop cars including a Rover P6 complete with radio, sirens and V8 engine, and a former Mod waves ciao to his collection of 1960s Italian scooters.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek swaps the chaos of the office for rain-soaked Ripon to pick up a 1965 Ford Anglia with just 33,000 miles on the clock, while Dave's loving the clean lines of a.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Two British classics head into to the Mathewsons' auction room, Dave heads to North Manchester to pick up an Austin A30 and a Morris 8 E with an alternative paint job.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole are close to the Malvern Hills, converting a pair of saddles into bar stools and hoping to make a profit on a 1960s kitchen cupboard.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Go Girls
programme.desc: Levi has big schemes for parties, awards and a new love interest for Ted. Meanwhile, Candy and Bennie both run into the hottest man on the Shore. S5 E2

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: There's patisserie pandemonium as the semi-finalists make cream horns, glass domes and showstopping macarons. Whose cream horn fills the judges with Parisian pleasure? And whose dome sends them home?

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: It’s the semi-final. Three challenges stand between the sewers and the final: plus fours, polo shirts and 1920s-inspired party outfits.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: Are Mrs Brown's family keeping too many secrets? Mrs Brown thinks so, and sets about uncovering them. S1 E2

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview Series‎
programme.desc: As the FIFA World Cup 2026 fast approaches, this preview series looks at all the nations that will be competing across the United States, Canada and Mexico with the goal of lifting the World Cup.

programme.title: Unbreakable
programme.desc: Mamie learns to throw a punch, Casey finds a surrogate, and fledgling pilot Jack takes to the skies! S3 E3

programme.title: Rich Holiday Poor Holiday
programme.desc: Season Finale: Polish cleaner Anna and her daughter Naomi exchange holidays with wealthy friends Harry and Lyndsey.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: The more you know, the further you go. Knowledge equals speed as contestants battle it out to reach the finish line first. Action-packed quiz fun with Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Bunty reunites with Father Brown to uncover a dark secret and mysterious goings-on at the local girls' borstal.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown investigates the mysterious death of a beekeeper.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The president of the Saint Marie cricket club is found shot dead in the middle of the team's ground. As the sun rises over the island, suspicion falls on his teammates.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: The team uncovers distorted loyalties that form when personal ties meet the trappings of fame when a troubled young pop star is suspected of killing her fiance.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch investigates the death of a man found in a burned-out truck and catches a glimpse of the impossible - a long-gone nemesis back from the dead.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A man appears after a bright flash of light in the middle of a field and claims to have been abducted by aliens.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The investigation into a brutal murder in a public toilet has Murdoch butting heads with Inspector Choi as he closes in on the killer.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Whilst demonstrating the new alternating electric current to consumers in Toronto, Miss Electric Toronto is electrocuted in front of a horrified crowd. Murdoch investigates.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown races to save Bunty from the hangman's noose when she is tried for murder.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: LaRoche suspects Hightower of a police-killer's murder, and when she is also linked to the death of an archaeology professor, Patrick jeopardises his career to help her.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a journalist is killed searching for buried pirate treasure, Charlie and Rex dig deep into the competitive world of treasure-hunters to unearth the killer.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Carrie's memory of her sister's murder is unlocked. Recalling a man's face, she pursues him for answers, but what will she find.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part One: The first episode of a two-part special sees an investigation into the death of a boat captain propel the team to London in pursuit of the suspects.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The investigation into a brutal murder in a public toilet has Murdoch butting heads with Inspector Choi as he closes in on the killer.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Whilst demonstrating the new alternating electric current to consumers in Toronto, Miss Electric Toronto is electrocuted in front of a horrified crowd. Murdoch investigates.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: LaRoche suspects Hightower of a police-killer's murder, and when she is also linked to the death of an archaeology professor, Patrick jeopardises his career to help her.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a journalist is killed searching for buried pirate treasure, Charlie and Rex dig deep into the competitive world of treasure-hunters to unearth the killer.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown races to save Bunty from the hangman's noose when she is tried for murder.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Carrie's memory of her sister's murder is unlocked. Recalling a man's face, she pursues him for answers, but what will she find.

programme.title: Saint-Pierre
programme.desc: Arch and Fitz race against time to save a kidnapped flight attendant, and then one of their own.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part One: The first episode of a two-part special sees an investigation into the death of a boat captain propel the team to London in pursuit of the suspects.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown investigates staff at the local health spa when an ex-employee is found murdered.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown races to save Bunty from the hangman's noose when she is tried for murder.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part One: The first episode of a two-part special sees an investigation into the death of a boat captain propel the team to London in pursuit of the suspects.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: The 20 remaining hopefuls have a second and final chance to cook their way into the competition. Just who will score themselves one of the final four places? S18 E3

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Viliami questions his behaviour.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Lacey misjudges Tane. Mackenzie needs space. Richie is welcomed in by the Langhams.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp hosts a nail-biting quiz. Using knowledge, strategy and a little luck, contestants must cross the Bridge, spotting the lies. One wrong step and they lose everything!

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: Each week, five groups of bonza, ripper, fair dinkum Aussies become travel critics as they head on a week-long holiday. This week's destination - Canberra!

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart befriends a new kid at school, unaware that he's a snitch. Meanwhile, after his car is damaged in an accident, Homer ends up with a fancy courtesy car. S19 E13

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard and Raj start to advertise their band, Footprints on the Moon. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Amy rekindle their relationship. S9 E10

programme.title: St. Denis Medical
programme.desc: Alex and Ron spar over the wisdom of open communication. Joyce brings in a body scanner that proves overly distracting. S2 E3

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: John and Remi interrogate Sonny's strange behaviour. Dana clashes with Alf. Mackenzie struggles to process her trauma.

programme.title: Ready Gamer Mum
programme.desc: As the teams start to thin following a second elimination, they're faced with separating their birdies from their bogeys in PGA Tour, the popular golf game.

programme.title: I Feel Pretty
programme.desc: Feel pretty awesome with Amy Schumer in this uplifting romantic comedy. A woman struggling with insecurity wakes from a fall believing she is the most beautiful and capable woman on the planet. (2018)

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Why does Jessica Knappett pile shoes on some butcher's scales? And what happens when James Acaster tries the emergency alarm on a lift? S7 E4

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A thrift store donation turns gruesome when a dead body is found in a box. S11 E14

programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: A withdrawn teen uses online chatrooms as an escape from her abusive home and discovers an attraction to older men, but she soon finds herself trapped in a deadly love triangle. S7 E6

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: Max discovers a revenue-generating department at the hospital that has serious legal implications. S5 E8

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Damages
programme.desc: As Fiske works to keep Gregory Malina from being deposed, Patty sows seeds of doubt between Tom and Ellen while working to get her son to come home from a reform academy. S1 E7

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: When Amy's daughter, Emma, is without a babysitter for the day, Amy secretly brings her to work. S1 E5

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions, and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature. Follow the friendship of these two prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Toi Time is back with a bang! Join Aunty Anika, Māia, Jojo, Tama, Buzz, and the new kid on the block, Riki. Get ready for laughter, learning, and lots of fun!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join this merry band of Smurfs on their many magical adventures as they try to outsmart the wicked sorcerer Gargamel and his cat Azrael.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic, Tails, Amy, Knuckles, and Sticks reside on Seaside Island in Hedgehog Village. Together they defend the island from various threats like Doctor Eggman and his robotic creations.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy are superheroes and roommates who love to save the day. But what happens when they're not fighting crime?

programme.title: Darwin And Newts
programme.desc: Darwin & Newts are a brother and sister duo who love adventures and figuring out how stuff works! Join them as they explore and discover new things, with the help of science and some Kiwi ingenuity.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Remi appeals to David. Sonny's a prime suspect. Mali snaps.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Fearless fishing! Amity is 100 miles offshore in the infamous Devil's Hole - things look bleak for skipper Jimmy as the engines which haul in his nets are near to failure.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: More high drama on the high seas as we follow trawler fishermen in Peterhead in Scotland. Trawler Ocean Venture is caught in a force nine gale that endangers the lives of her crew.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Gripping reality series about trawler fishermen in Peterhead in Scotland. Ocean Venture is in the grip of a storm with her nets caught on the seabed - can first mate Barry free them.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Braving the elements with those hardy trawler fishermen in Scotland. Ominous weather warnings mean that Sandy Watt must decide whether to brave violent storms or head for safety.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek auctions off a Jensen Interceptor and a Jensen Healey along with a one-off Wood & Pickett Triumph Dolomite Sprint.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Rover 2000 SC / Triumph Spitfire: A 1971 Mercedes SL and a 1989 Jaguar XJS emerge from a chicken farm barn, a Roller and a Rover go under the hammer, and a 1966 Triumph Spitfire is restored.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek takes a shine to a rare 1958 Armstrong Siddeley Sapphire with a long family history and a convertible Triumph Herald brings a few smiles on auction day.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: An Aston Martin DB6 in need of total restoration looks set to break the Mathewsons auction record and news of a rare Vincent motorbike arriving causes a stir.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek picks up some emerging sporting classics from the far east when three Datsun Zs appear, and an unusual lot arrives that run on caterpillar tracks not wheels. S3 Ep.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek auctions off a Jensen Interceptor and a Jensen Healey along with a one-off Wood & Pickett Triumph Dolomite Sprint.

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Robson and podcaster Rosie Ramsey sign up for a bushcraft lesson and test the health benefits of laughter during an adrenaline-fuelled power buggy race.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: England became a supply dump as the British and Americans assembled the largest invasion fleet in history for Operation Overlord on 6 June 1944. Laurence Olivier tells all.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Hear how the Netherlands lived under Nazi rule for four years and how its people decided where their loyalties lay. Narrated by the late, great Laurence Olivier.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier provides the narration to this World War II retrospective. Hear how 1944 saw the steady disintegration of the German war machine, as the Allies advanced.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: How did Heinrich Himmler plan to realise Hitler's vision of a pure Aryan Germany? Actor Laurence Olivier explains as he narrates the acclaimed documentary series about WWII.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: England became a supply dump as the British and Americans assembled the largest invasion fleet in history for Operation Overlord on 6 June 1944. Laurence Olivier tells all.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Hear how the Netherlands lived under Nazi rule for four years and how its people decided where their loyalties lay. Narrated by the late, great Laurence Olivier.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier provides the narration to this World War II retrospective. Hear how 1944 saw the steady disintegration of the German war machine, as the Allies advanced.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: How did Heinrich Himmler plan to realise Hitler's vision of a pure Aryan Germany? Actor Laurence Olivier explains as he narrates the acclaimed documentary series about WWII.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Featuring Natalie Cole, Fine Young Cannibals, The Beatmasters With Merlin, and Bangles. Gary Davies presents.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Featuring Tone Loc, Robert Palmer, Cappella, and Wasp. Simon Mayo presents.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Featuring Natalie Cole, Double Trouble & Rebel Mc, Neneh Cherry, and Fuzzbox. Gary Davies and Anthea Turner present.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Featuring Cliff Richard, The Beautiful South, D Mob Featuring Lrs, and Jason Donovan. Nicky Campbell presents.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Featuring Queen, Donna Allen, Waterfront, and M. Anthea Turner presents.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Featuring Gladys Knight, Karyn White, Pet Shop Boys, and Soul II Soul. Nicky Campbell presents.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Featuring Gloria Estefan, Kirsty Maccoll, Paul Mccartney, and Simple Minds. Mark Goodier and Simon Parkin present.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Featuring Martika, Alice Cooper, Wendy & Lisa, and Kylie Minogue. Jenny Powell and Steve Wright present.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Featuring Debbie Gibson, Black Box, Eurythmics, and Tears For Fears. Gary Davies presents.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Featuring Madonna, Tears For Fears, London Boys, and Wasp. Andy Crane and Simon Mayo present.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Featuring Jive Bunny & The Mastermixers, Belinda Carlisle, Sinitta, and Black Box. Gary Davies presents.
